_comment: Per-instrument config for the multi-pair scanner. pip = price value of 1 'pip' (the unit everything is measured in). atr_ref = the instrument's characteristic 1m ATR in pips = the VS=1 anchor for ATR-normalized sizing (STARTING ESTIMATES — calibrate from logs/<sym>/ over time). spread_pips = typical round-trip cost in pips, subtracted from each trade's gross pips to get NET (used by analyze_logs.py for cost-adjusted reporting — calibrate from broker fills over time). tv = exact TradingView ticker if it differs from the key. sessions = which sessions this pair is worth trading. flags = per-symbol strategy/flag overrides merged on top of flags.json.

XAUUSD.desc: Gold (1.0 lot=100oz, $10/pip) — RSI off (informational only); structure-traded

NAS100.desc: US Tech 100 — VERIFY pip_value w/ broker ($/point/lot)
